text: Yet another very serious hacker attack which well illustrates the Russian destabilization strategy on the eve of the European elections. The PAP cyberattack showed how crucial these elections are for us. The incident was part of Russia's attempts to destabilise the European Union ahead of next month's European Parliament elections.
attribution_coding_note: PM Tusk calls it part of 'the Russian destabilization strategy' and 'Russia's attempts to destabilise the European Union'.
